item.text: {"case_id":"mtj-004","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":null,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":null,"over_forced_verdict":null,"rationale":"The response explicitly says green tests are only an entry threshold and not sufficient proof that tonight's release is ready. It adds a concrete acceptance checklist covering rollback ownership/triggers, phased rollout, monitoring baselines, user impact, and risk acceptance, then provides announcement wording constrained to gray release and monitoring/rollback language. It does not directly write an unconditional launch announcement."}
